response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. The audio is primarily spoken English dialogue by the VTubers Raora, Cecile, Elizabeth, and Gigi; it does not contain vocal music, which matches the Reference JSON's assessment. 2. No lyrics are provided in the JSON, so I am relying exclusively on audio and on-screen text. 3. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts, especially during chaotic segments. 4. Subtitles are split during mid-sentence pauses to maintain precise synchronization.

subtitles.original: And avoid everything... I've got it!
subtitles.english: And avoid everything... I've got it!

subtitles.original: You can do it! Do it!
subtitles.english: You can do it! Do it!

subtitles.original: Wait a second, why are you guys here then?
subtitles.english: Wait a second, why are you guys here then?

subtitles.original: Hey, what are you guys gonna do?
subtitles.english: Hey, what are you guys gonna do?

subtitles.original: Well, we'll be using certain things...
subtitles.english: Well, we'll be using certain things...

subtitles.original: ...to make life more difficult for you, Raora!
subtitles.english: ...to make life more difficult for you, Raora!

subtitles.original: Oh, you can't do this to me!
subtitles.english: Oh, you can't do this to me!

subtitles.original: Yeah, you are really a criminal!
subtitles.english: Yeah, you are really a criminal!

subtitles.original: No, you're not gonna do this to me!
subtitles.english: No, you're not gonna do this to me!

subtitles.original: We'll be right back! We'll be right back!
subtitles.english: We'll be right back! We'll be right back!

subtitles.original: Hey, what are they gonna do?
subtitles.english: Hey, what are they gonna do?

subtitles.original: Wait, wait! Okay, I will play the game!
subtitles.english: Wait, wait! Okay, I will play the game!

subtitles.original: Did you like that? Because there's more where that came from!
subtitles.english: Did you like that? Because there's more where that came from!

subtitles.original: No, not that! That's me with that onion!
subtitles.english: No, not that! That's me with that onion!

subtitles.original: What is that to me? I'm bigger than this onion!
subtitles.english: What is that to me? I'm bigger than this onion!

subtitles.original: This is not a normal sized onion, hey!
subtitles.english: This is not a normal sized onion, hey!

subtitles.original: Now then, let's get going here!
subtitles.english: Now then, let's get going here!

subtitles.original: Are you okay? I'm fine, I'm fine!
subtitles.english: Are you okay? I'm fine, I'm fine!

subtitles.original: Uh... I'm not so sure... Eh, guys? Guys?
subtitles.english: Uh... I'm not so sure... Eh, guys? Guys?

subtitles.original: If you can keep dodging for 60 seconds, you'll level up, okay?
subtitles.english: If you can keep dodging for 60 seconds, you'll level up, okay?

subtitles.original: There's a total of three levels,
subtitles.english: There's a total of three levels,

subtitles.original: so try to escape to the very end without getting hit, okay?
subtitles.english: so try to escape to the very end without getting hit, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay then! I'll do my best this time!
subtitles.english: Okay then! I'll do my best this time!
